TITLE: Precision weather
SUBTITLE: Météo-France radar, current conditions and forecast
FORECAST_OPTIONS_HINT: Settings shared by the multi-day forecast tabs (OpenWeatherMap, Open-Meteo, comparison).
SHOW_TEMPERATURE_TOOLTIPS_HINT: On label hover: humidity, wind, station, etc.
SHOW_TEMPERATURE_MAP_HINT: Météo-France station temperatures (DPObs v2, at actual station positions).
TEMPERATURE_SOURCE_AUTO_FOREIGN: Outside metropolitan France DPObs area: no MF stations on the map. Click to compare Open-Meteo and OpenWeatherMap.
TEMPERATURE_COMPARE_HINT: Météo-France stations on the map. Click to compare MF, Open-Meteo and OpenWeatherMap.
TEMPERATURE_MAP_HINT: Current temperatures as numbers on the map.
TEMPERATURE_MAP_HINT_MF: Météo-France station observations (DPObs v2) at each station's real position; overlapping labels are hidden.
TEMPERATURE_MAP_HINT_MF_COMPARE: Météo-France stations on the map. Click to compare MF, Open-Meteo and OpenWeatherMap at the selected point.
TEMPERATURE_MAP_HINT_OPENMETEO: Open-Meteo source: no stations on the map. Click a point to show temperatures.
TEMPERATURE_MAP_HINT_POINT_ONLY: Outside metropolitan France DPObs area: no stations on the map. Click to compare Open-Meteo and OpenWeatherMap.
POINT_COMPARE_SPREAD: Differences are normal: different sources, stations and times.
TEMPERATURE_LABELS_EMPTY: No temperatures available for this area (try zooming in or retry shortly).
DPOBS_NOT_CONFIGURED: MF observations v2: subscribe to « Public Observation Data » on portail-api.meteofrance.fr, then set meteofrance.obs.api.token (Open-Meteo fallback active).
DPOBS_INVALID_TOKEN: Météo-France observations token rejected (401). Check meteofrance.obs.api.token (« Public Observation Data » API, distinct from radar and clim keys).
RADAR_REFRESH_INTERVAL_HINT: Seconds between two radar updates (30–600, default 60). Saved when you leave the field or press Enter.
TEMPERATURE_CACHE_MINUTES_HINT: How long map temperature labels stay cached (1–120, default 5 min). Saved when you leave the field or press Enter.
MAP_HINT: Click the map or drag the marker to pick a location.
BACKEND_LOG_EMPTY: No loads yet — requests will appear here in real time.
CLOUD_INTENSITY_HINT: Boosts cloud contrast server-side and in the display (OpenWeatherMap). Reloads tiles when you release the slider.
PRECIPITATION_LAYER_RAINVIEWER: Precipitation: RainViewer (fallback — MF API returns HDF5, {{time}}).
CLOUD_LAYER_ERROR: Clouds: failed to load layer (RainViewer satellite discontinued — check openweathermap.api.key).
TEMPERATURE_STATUS_CACHED: Temperatures: {{source}} — from server cache ({{trigger}}, {{time}}, {{count}} stations, TTL {{ttl}} min){{detailSuffix}}.
STATION_HISTORY_MODAL_HINT: Météo-France archives (DPClim) for this station: charts of available parameters over the selected period.
RADAR_HINT: Click the map or drag the marker to pick a location. Radar shows precipitation, not clouds.
RADAR_RAINVIEWER_FALLBACK: (RainViewer radar display proxied by PatTool — MF API returns HDF5 files)
RADAR_CLEAR_SKY: Dry weather: no radar colors is normal.
RADAR_LOAD_ERROR: Could not load the radar layer.
DPRADAR_NOT_CONFIGURED: Radar unavailable: subscribe free to the « Public Radar Data » API on portail-api.meteofrance.fr, then set meteofrance.api.token in application.properties (or PatTool Parameters).
DPRADAR_INVALID_TOKEN: Météo-France token rejected (401). On the portal: « Public Radar Data » API → Configure → « API Key » → Generate token → paste into meteofrance.api.token (no Bearer prefix). Or use meteofrance.oauth.application-id.
FORECAST_MF_UNAVAILABLE: Météo-France DPObs does not provide multi-day forecasts. Choose Open-Meteo or OpenWeatherMap.
GPS_UNAVAILABLE: Geolocation is not available on this device.
CLIM_LOADING: Ordering and downloading archives (may take a few seconds)…
CLIM_LOAD_ERROR: Could not load climatological data for this period or station.
CLIM_NO_DATA: No data for the requested period.
CLIM_HINT: Official DPClim archives (CSV). Requires « Climatological Data » subscription + meteofrance.clim.api.token (different from the radar key).
AROMEPI_HINT: High-resolution Météo-France model: 0–6 h forecast in 15 min steps. Animated WMS map (clouds, precipitation, etc.) plus values at the selected point.
AROMEPI_NOT_CONFIGURED: AROME-PI unavailable: subscribe to API « AROMEPI 1.0 » on portail-api.meteofrance.fr, then set meteofrance.aromepi.api.token (separate from radar, clim and obs keys).
AROMEPI_INVALID_TOKEN: AROME-PI key rejected (401). Portal: API « AROMEPI 1.0 » → API Key → meteofrance.aromepi.api.token.
AROMEPI_LOADING: Loading WMS layers and time steps…
AROMEPI_LOAD_ERROR: Could not load AROME-PI capabilities (check API key).
AROMEPI_LAYER_ERROR: Could not display the WMS layer for this forecast step.
AROMEPI_STATION_OUTSIDE_FRANCE: Outside metropolitan France: AROME-PI covers France only.
AROMEPI_STATION_UNAVAILABLE: DPObs station unavailable (observation key not configured or catalog empty).
AROMEPI_STATION_HINT: Nearest Météo-France station used as a reference for the selected point.
AROMEPI_FORECAST_LOADING: Querying WMS at point for each step…
DPCLIM_NOT_CONFIGURED: Clim archives unavailable: subscribe to « Données Climatologiques » on portail-api.meteofrance.fr, then set meteofrance.clim.api.token (separate from the radar key).
DPCLIM_INVALID_TOKEN: DPClim key rejected (401). Portal: « Données Climatologiques » API → API Key → meteofrance.clim.api.token (not the radar key).
FORECAST_OWM_HINT: 3-hour forecast via the OpenWeatherMap API (PatTool server key).
FORECAST_OM_HINT: Open-Meteo multi-model blend, 3-hour steps, no API key.
FORECAST_AGG_HINT: Météo-France = AROME seamless model via Open-Meteo. One row per step (period and step from the Options tab). « — » = no data from that source at this step.
FORECAST_SETTINGS_HINT: Longer horizon or smaller step = more data points.
FORECAST_MAP_HINT: Click the map or drag the marker to change the forecast location.
